F

free() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.AlignmentList
 
free() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermAtomList
Clean up the references and return the object to the pool.
free() - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.CoordList
Clean up the references and return the object to the pool.
free(T) - Method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.Pool
Calls the method Poolable.cleanUp() to clean the object and returns it into this pool.
fullCleanUp() - Static method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.algo.AlignmentList
Cleans up the entire memory from the current object pool.
fullCleanUp() - Static method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data.TermAtomList
Cleans up the entire memory from the current object pool.
fullCleanUp() - Static method in class at.jku.risc.stout.urau.util.CoordList
Cleans up the entire memory from the current object pool.
